report_name: WALLIX and Inria Partner to Develop Sovereign AI for Cybersecurity in France

identities.name: WALLIX
identities.description: A French cybersecurity firm and European provider of Privileged Access Management (PAM) and Identity and Access Management (IAM) solutions, partnering with Inria to develop sovereign AI for cybersecurity.

identities.name: Inria
identities.description: France's national research institute for digital science and technology, partnering with WALLIX to create a new generation of sovereign and trusted Artificial Intelligence (AI) solutions for the cybersecurity market.

identities.name: European organizations
identities.description: The intended beneficiaries of the sovereign, AI-driven cybersecurity solutions developed by the WALLIX and Inria partnership, particularly those in regulated and critical sectors.
